fields.summary: Build Master module for MaWo app
[Umbrella] MaWo - A Master Worker framework on top of YARN Services

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description:
Master component for MaWo application is responsible for driving end-to-end job execution. Its responsibility is
 * Get Job definition and create a Queue of Tasks
 * Assign Tasks to Worker
 * Manage Workers lifecycle
